events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer only JSON. User scenario: unblocked soffits in residential job, fireblocking & draftstopping, rough-complete, IRC R302. Need identify component or condition and visible defect cues. decision fail because non-compliant (unblocked soffits violate fireblocking). risk? Soffits can allow fire/draft spread, medium to high. In residential fireblocking, unblocked soffits are common defect, risk medium/high. We'll set high? Need align with competent inspector. Fireblocking at soffits prevents vertical/horizontal flame spread; missing is significant. Maybe high. component_conditions installed-defective, non-compliant. percent_complete rough-complete maybe 75? value 0. findings: unblocked soffits, missing fireblocking/draftstopping at ceiling/soffit chases, vertical/horizontal concealed spaces not sealed. actions: install listed fireblocking material (2x lumber, 23/32 plywood, 1/2 gypsum, etc.) to close concealed spaces per IRC R302.4, inspect all soffits/drops/chases. references: IRC R302.4 Fireblocking. order empty. workable empty. event_time 0. rate 0. sound_source empty. Now produce JSON raw. Ensure no markdown fences.
